headline: Linde Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings and Conference Call Schedule
summary: WOKING, England, July 01, 2026--Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) will release its second quarter 2026 financial results by 06:00 EDT/midday CEST on Friday, July 31, 2026. The Company will host and webcast its conference call at 09:00 EDT/15:00 CEST, which will be available to the public and the media in listen-only mode.
